name: Suzy's Caramel
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine all ingredients.
2. Cook over medium heat for approximately half to three-quarters of an hour (longer if doubling or tripling the recipe). Stir constantly to prevent burning.
3. If the butter separates from the mixture, gently beat it back in; no issue exists.
4. The finished mixture will resemble peanut butter in consistency.
5. For a sauce, cook for about 15 minutes. It won't be thick but will be delicious.
6. Use this caramel for making Turtles with pecans or walnuts, as a coating for apples, or any other purpose requiring caramel. You can double or triple the recipe as needed.
7. This recipe has been perfected over the years and should yield excellent results every time. If you encounter any problems, please let me know and I'll assist in resolving them.
